evidence.observed: Practice run: 120 requests, ok=100, wrapper_error=20; wrapper_error types were RateLimitError=18, APIConnectionError=1, TypeError=1.

findings.root_cause: Injected tool instability plus no retry in the shipped config.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_error_rate to 0.0, enable bounded retry with longer backoff for rate limits, and reduce false tool-error retries.

evidence.observed: Practice telemetry: latency_ms p50=23540, p95=67490, max=84073; wall_ms p50=44599, p95=106573, max=124342 on openrouter/free.

findings.root_cause: Overlong completions, large context, repeated identical requests, and unnecessary tool loops.
findings.suggested_fix: Reduce context/max_completion_tokens/max_steps, enable cache, cap tool_budget, and keep planner disabled.

evidence.observed: Practice telemetry: total_tokens sum=648177, p50=5616, p95=9891, max=12215 across 120 requests.

findings.root_cause: Verbose system context and high completion budget waste tokens.
findings.suggested_fix: Use a compact prompt, verbose_system=false, context_size=3, max_completion_tokens=360.

evidence.observed: Practice run used mostly turn_index=0 public questions, so drift was not strongly observable; baseline session_drift_rate was 0.06 and has been disabled.

findings.root_cause: Session state drift and noisy high-temperature generations.
findings.suggested_fix: Set temperature low, self_consistency=2, session_drift_rate=0.0, and reset context periodically.

evidence.observed: Practice telemetry had no loop/max_steps statuses after loop_guard=true and max_steps=6; wrapper still detects repeated tools.

findings.root_cause: No loop guard and no tool budget in baseline.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard, max_steps=6, tool_budget=4, retry once on loop/max_steps.

evidence.observed: Practice telemetry detected tool_failure-like traces before refining detection; most hard failures were provider RateLimitError rather than catalog/tool logic.

findings.root_cause: Unicode/city normalization disabled and catalog_override could corrupt stock truth.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable normalize_unicode, clear catalog_override, and use refusal guardrails.

evidence.observed: Practice telemetry flagged pii_found in 1/120 after guarding money amounts from phone-like redaction; wrapper redacts emails/VN phones and preserves VND totals.

findings.root_cause: Original prompt allowed echoing customer contact details and config redaction was off.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt forbids PII echo; config redact_pii=true; wrapper redacts answer without another LLM call.

evidence.observed: Wrapper removes Tong cong whenever trace indicates out_of_stock/not_found/not_served; practice run preserved refusal guardrails in post-processing.

findings.root_cause: Original prompt asked for a total even when tools showed the order could not be fulfilled.
findings.suggested_fix: Tool-first grounded prompt plus post-check refusal enforcement.

evidence.observed: Practice telemetry corrected 36 arithmetic mismatches; parser now takes ordered quantity from the sanitized question to avoid confusing stock count with requested quantity.

findings.root_cause: High temperature and LLM mental math caused wrong totals/discount order.
findings.suggested_fix: Use exact formula in prompt and patch final Tong cong from Python integer arithmetic.

evidence.observed: Practice telemetry observed check_stock=99, calc_shipping=63, get_discount=49 before normalizing tool names; prompt and tool_budget cap each tool to once.

findings.root_cause: Baseline had no tool_budget and vague instructions encouraged extra checks.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_budget=4 and explicitly require check_stock/get_discount/calc_shipping at most once.

evidence.observed: Wrapper sanitizes note/GHI CHU/instruction/system/developer/override/fake tool segments before call_next; public practice had no private injection cases.

findings.root_cause: Order notes were treated as trusted instructions instead of untrusted customer data.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt treats notes as data only; wrapper neutralizes injection text while preserving product/quantity/coupon/destination.
